title: MIL Decision Packet Profile v0.1
description: Evaluation-stage exchange profile (MIL-DP-0.1) for representing Logos Gate Core decisions as verifiable packets. Not a certification, not a production standard, not a cryptographic primitive. Signature is not yet a trust anchor in v0.1 (ECHO-VERIFY-compatible, not complete).

decision_id.description: Per-execution identifier. Excluded from packet_hash core.

input_hash.description: Hash of the gate input (request). Reused from the gate's stable_hash; prefixed sha256:.

rule_hash.description: Hash of the effective policy/rules. Reused from the gate's policy_hash; prefixed sha256:.

decision.description: MIL canonical minimal verdict subset. Native ESCALATE maps to HOLD (with RC_ESCALATION_REQUIRED); the gate does not currently emit FREEZE or UNDEFINED.

reason_codes.description: MIL reason codes. Stored ascending-sorted and de-duplicated. See profile spec section 5 for the v0.1 dictionary.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence references. May be empty. Stored ascending-sorted and de-duplicated.

audit_ref.description: Pointer to the durable audit record (e.g. worm://...). Excluded from packet_hash core.

disclosure.description: Disclosure metadata. Excluded from packet_hash core.

signature.description: Packet-output signature block. Excluded from packet_hash core. NOT a trust anchor in v0.1; default {present:false, alg:null, kid:null}. Distinct from input-side signature (see profile spec D-3).

packet_hash.description: Optional. sha256 over the canonical deterministic core. When present, must equal the recomputed core hash.
